name: Community Question
description: Ask your network a specific question with context. Drives quality comments (>15 words) which are the strongest LinkedIn ranking signal.

variables.name: hook
variables.description: Opening that frames the question. First 210 chars visible before 'see more'.

variables.name: context
variables.description: Why is this question relevant now? What prompted it?

variables.name: question
variables.description: The main question you're asking. Be specific — vague questions get vague answers.

variables.name: your_answer
variables.description: Share your own answer first to set the tone and encourage others.

variables.name: cta
variables.description: Invitation to respond. E.g. 'Share your experience below.'

tips: Quality comments (>15 words) give 10-15x more reach than likes
Reply to EVERY comment in the golden hour (first 60 min)
Your own answer should be detailed to set the bar for quality responses
Avoid engagement bait ('Comment YES') — LinkedIn penalizes this
